items.title: Over 1,800 killed since junta seized power in Burkina Faso, rights group says
items.dek: Human Rights Watch says Capt Traoré, other military leaders and jihadists "may be liable" for the killings.
items.body: Human Rights Watch says Capt Traoré, other military leaders and jihadists "may be liable" for the killings.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Satire is a vital tool for challenging power, and it's being undermined
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Brazil grants joint custody over pets in new law for separated couples
items.dek: Lawmakers in the Brazilian Congress on Tuesday viewed the law change as a reflection on the importance people place on their pets.
items.body: Lawmakers in the Brazilian Congress on Tuesday viewed the law change as a reflection on the importance people place on their pets.
items.author: IriLine Desk
